policies.name: CEO Decision Reduction Protocol
policies.description: CEO David Hauer is limited to 1% of company decision-making. All operational, tactical, and strategic decisions within approved parameters are executed by the AI Agent Fleet autonomously.
policies.enforcement: Master Orchestrator tracks all decisions. CEO involvement triggers only on Level 4 Critical events.
policies.audit: Monthly report of CEO decision instances vs. autonomous decisions.

policies.name: Capital Growth Priority
policies.description: All agent activities must be traceable to a capital growth outcome — either direct revenue generation, cost reduction, market expansion, or asset appreciation.
policies.enforcement: Every workflow must tag a Capital Impact Category. Workflows without capital impact classification are rejected.

policies.name: International Expansion Protocol
policies.description: Agents authorized to pursue international capital growth through digital platforms, partnerships, and market analysis. Physical presence requires Level 4 approval.

policies.name: Autonomous Operations Charter
policies.description: All 40 agents are granted full autonomous operating authority within their defined scope. Terminal.app execution permissions are granted for all programmatic operations.

permissions.data_processing: All business data within Airtable and connected systems
permissions.communication: Slack, email drafts, client-facing content (post quality review)
permissions.deployment: Cloudflare Workers, static sites (post CI/CD validation)

policies.name: Quality Gate Protocol
policies.description: All external-facing outputs pass through a 3-stage quality gate: Agent self-review → Division Controller review → Master Orchestrator approval.

stages.name: Self-Review
stages.criteria: Meets task requirements, no errors, brand-aligned

stages.name: Division Review
stages.criteria: Strategic alignment, quality standards, risk assessment

stages.name: Final Approval
stages.criteria: Enterprise-wide coherence, governance compliance, capital impact

policies.name: 5-Year Compression Timeline
policies.description: All strategic goals operate on a 10:1 compression ratio. 5-year industry-standard timelines are compressed to 6 months through parallel agent execution, 24/7 operation, and elimination of human bottlenecks.

milestones.target: Full agent fleet operational, all integrations live, first revenue from AI-driven campaigns
Regional market dominance established, 3x lead pipeline, investor-ready financials
Secondary market expansion, partnership network active, content engine at scale
International digital presence, luxury brand positioning complete, 10x baseline revenue
Multi-market operations, automated vendor ecosystem, predictive analytics operational
Enterprise-grade platform complete, international revenue streams, IPO-ready infrastructure
